name: Luka | Alien stage
description:
⠀ೃ❀࿔ : Luka seeking comfort in your arms after yet another tiring round

I saw a post abt 'emotional support humans' and it just hasn't left my head
And IT MADE DO MUCH SENSE.
Cuz of how the humans seem so uncomfortable around the aliens, so ofc they'd get their other humans/pets to get close to their little stars and calm them down.

IM EMOTIONALLY DEAD AFTER ROUND 7. DEAD DONE BUT AT LEAST LUKA LOOKED PRETTY...

My Till bot ver!
